text:

FreeBSD t590 13.1-STABLE FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #8 patch-bug-252288-c3f1ecb0d8: Fri Nov 18 22:35:23 CET 2022     root@t590:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64

issue on all drm-510-kmod I can compile (5.10.113_5 and up)

issue disappear if I put back old drm-54-kmod binary (5.4.191.g20220604). I can't compile this module anymore.
